title: Lunar Moon: Reborn
description: A remake of the Lunar Moon from those old cursed seed Minecraft videos.
body:
As a kid, you probably saw one of those "I PLAYED THE LUNAR MOON CURSED SEED IN MY MINECRAFT WORLD" Minecraft videos, and always wanted to try it for yourself. Turns out, the Lunar Moon was only a resource pack and commands. But here, I remade the Lunar Moon for everyone to enjoy!

When the Lunar Moon rises, it will shoot fireballs from above, rain down meteors, and summon lightning.

_Use code ITSSMUDGY for 25% off: [https://www.bisecthosting.com/itssmudgy](https://www.bisecthosting.com/itssmudgy)_

_Join our Discord: [https://discord.gg/hVcqt4vzbu](https://discord.gg/hVcqt4vzbu)_

_Support me on Ko-Fi: [https://ko-fi.com/itssmudgy](https://ko-fi.com/itssmudgy)_

**This mod requires Geckolib**
